title: Law Firm Case Showcase Site
summary: Premium websites built for law firms to present verdicts, settlements, and case victories with forensic credibility
description: A purpose-built web presence for litigators and trial attorneys who need to demonstrate track record. Architected to display case wins, verdict amounts, settlement summaries, practice area breakdowns, and attorney profiles — all presented with the precision and restraint expected by opposing counsel and prospective clients alike. Built on modern React architecture with server-side rendering for SEO. WCAG 2.1 AA compliant. Mobile-first. No templates — every site is built from specification.

priceTiers.name: Solo Practitioner
features: Contact intake form with case-type routing

priceTiers.name: Mid-Size Firm
priceTiers.description: Multi-attorney firm with full case portfolio
features: Full case results database with search & filter
Practice area landing pages with case linkage

priceTiers.name: Enterprise / Trial Firm
priceTiers.description: Full-scale digital presence for high-volume litigation firms
features: Case results database with advanced filtering
Custom case study pages with timeline views
Attorney directory with filtering by practice area
Client portal with secure document exchange

deliverables: Deployment to your hosting or managed hosting
requirements: Firm must provide case data (verdicts, settlements, descriptions), attorney headshots, and brand assets (logo, color palette). We handle the rest.

title: White-Label Agency Partnership
summary: Full-service web development under your brand. You sell it. We build it. Your clients never know.
description: For marketing agencies, consultancies, and entrepreneurs who want to offer premium web development without hiring a dev team. You maintain the client relationship and set your own margins. We handle architecture, design implementation, development, QA, and deployment — all under your brand, your domain, your invoice. Every deliverable ships with your company name. NDAs standard. White-glove onboarding for your first 3 client projects.

priceTiers.name: Per-Project
features: Single website build under your brand
Direct Slack/Teams channel for project coordination
Your branding on all client-facing materials

priceTiers.name: 5-Project Retainer
features: 5 website builds at reduced per-unit cost
White-label project intake form for your clients

priceTiers.name: Unlimited Retainer
features: Custom process documentation for your agency
Agency partner badge for your website

deliverables: Production source code (your repo or ours)
Handoff call with your client (if requested)
requirements: You handle the client relationship, sales, and billing. We handle the build. Minimum project scope: 5-page responsive website.

title: Small Business Web Presence
summary: Agency-grade websites at small business pricing. No templates. No page builders. Real development.
description: Most small businesses get sold overpriced WordPress templates or underpowered drag-and-drop sites. This is neither. You get the same technology stack used by funded startups and enterprise clients — React, modern CSS, proper SEO, real performance optimization — but scoped and priced for a local business. Your site loads fast, ranks well, looks sharp on every device, and actually converts visitors into customers.

priceTiers.name: Growth
priceTiers.description: Full business website with lead generation

deliverables: Production website deployed to your domain
requirements: Business must provide logo, brand colors, copy/content (or purchase content writing add-on), and domain name.

title: Legal Landing Page
summary: High-conversion single-page sites for practice areas, case intake, or campaign-specific attorney marketing
description: A single, focused page designed to convert visitors into consultations. Built for attorneys running Google Ads, social media campaigns, or practice-area marketing who need a dedicated landing destination. Fast load times, clear calls to action, intake form integration, and conversion tracking built in. Not a template — each page is built to specification for your practice area and market.

priceTiers.name: Standard Landing Page
features: Case intake form with email routing

priceTiers.name: Campaign Bundle (3 pages)
priceTiers.description: Three landing pages for multi-practice campaigns
features: Shared design system for brand consistency

title: Case Results Display Widget
summary: Embeddable verdict and settlement display component for any existing website
description: A standalone, embeddable component that displays your firm's case results (verdicts, settlements, awards) on your existing website — regardless of platform. Works with WordPress, Squarespace, Wix, custom sites, and any HTML page. Filter by practice area, sort by amount, and auto-format currency. No server required. Loads via a single script tag. Styled to match your existing site. Data managed through a simple JSON file or admin interface.

priceTiers.name: Widget License
priceTiers.description: One-time license for a single domain
features: Embeddable script tag — works on any site
Sortable by verdict amount or date

priceTiers.name: Managed Widget
features: Hosted admin panel for case entry

title: Agency Starter Kit
summary: Everything you need to launch a web development agency — processes, templates, and your first client site build
description: For entrepreneurs ready to start selling web development services but lacking the technical infrastructure. Includes branded proposal templates, SOW templates, client intake workflows, project management setup, and one complete client website build to use as your portfolio piece. You learn the process by doing — we build alongside you for your first project, then you run independently.

priceTiers.name: Starter Kit
features: 1 complete client website build (up to 5 pages)

title: Website Maintenance & Growth Retainer
summary: Ongoing development hours for updates, new features, performance optimization, and content changes
description: For businesses and firms that need continuous web development support without hiring in-house. Covers content updates, design tweaks, new page builds, performance tuning, security patches, and feature additions. Dedicated developer assigned. Hours tracked transparently. Unused hours roll over for 1 month.

title: Document Drafting Services
summary: Professional legal document preparation and drafting — formatted to court specifications
description: Expert document preparation for motions, responses, briefs, contracts, and correspondence. Formatted to court specifications with proper citations and exhibits. Not legal advice — document preparation and formatting only.
